subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest how the ungodly have prevented the Pen of Command from mentioning Thy mysteries and have seized [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی انت تعلم بان المشرکین منعوا قلم الامر عن ذکر اسرارک و اخذوا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
